deep_dive.title: ConTrans: Learning Text-enhanced Local-global Temporal Representations for Zero-shot Temporal Action Localization
deep_dive.abstract: Zero-shot Temporal Action Localization (ZS-TAL) aims to detect and locate previously unseen actions in untrimmed videos. However, existing approaches primarily focus on modeling long-range contextual information, often neglecting the critical relative-offset-based local correlations between video frames. Furthermore, their performance is hindered by limited feature representation capabilities due to the shallow nature of their network architectures. In this paper, we address these limitations by introducing a novel local-global multi-scale feature representation module. We propose a novel multi-scale encoder architecture, termed ConTrans, that integrates convolutional (Conv) inductive biases with transformer Self-attention to jointly capture fine-grained local dependencies and long-range global context, leading to more comprehensive feature representations than existing methods. Experimental evaluations on the ActivityNet-1.3 and THUMOS14 datasets demonstrate that ConTrans significantly outperforms existing methods, establishing a new benchmark for ZS-TAL.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes ConTrans, a multi-scale encoder that integrates convolutional inductive biases with transformers for zero-shot temporal action localization, achieving strong detection of unseen actions.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有零样本时间动作定位方法主要关注长程上下文，忽略了帧间局部相对偏移相关性，且网络较浅导致特征表达能力有限。本文提出ConTrans，一种集成卷积归纳偏置与Transformer的多尺度编码器架构，通过局部-全局多尺度特征表示模块增强未修剪视频中未见动作的检测与定位能力。实验表明该方法在多个基准上取得了优异性能，为零样本动作识别提供了有效解决方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有零样本时间动作定位方法主要关注长程上下文，忽略了帧间局部相对偏移相关性，且网络较浅导致特征表达能力有限。本文提出ConTrans，一种集成卷积归纳偏置与Transformer的多尺度编码器架构，通过局部-全局多尺度特征表示模块增强未修剪视频中未见动作的检测与定位能力。实验表明该方法在多个基准上取得了优异性能，为零样本动作识别提供了有效解决方案。
